title: No Crying Over Spilled Milk
body:
# Has this ever happened to you?

![burning to death in lava and losing all of your gear](https://media1.tenor.com/m/omaR2LY6oVUAAAAd/minecraft-death.gif)

If not you, then probably someone you know. One wrong move, one unlucky skill check, and **all your gear is gone… instantly.**

Many players turn to the `keepInventory` game rule to avoid this, but let’s be honest, it removes much of the **risk and reward** that makes Minecraft exciting.

---

## 🥛 **No Crying Over Spilled Milk**

That’s why I created this **server-side mod**. Using a simple config file, you can:

- Customize **which items are dropped on death**  
- Decide **how much of each item you keep**  

Each item type is assigned a **percentage representing the chance to keep it**.  
For example: 🍎 **Food at 50%** → each individual piece of food has a 50/50 chance to stay in your inventory. You might keep some, you might lose some. The randomness keeps every death **meaningful.**

Want to guarantee certain types of items stay safe anyway? Just set their percentage to **100%**, and they’re yours to keep.

What sets this apart from vanilla `keepInventory` isn’t the items you keep, but the ones you choose to risk.

---

### 📦 Current Supported Categories
- Equipment
- Food  
- Tools  
- Blocks  
- Weapons  
- Enchanted Items  
- Epic Items  
- Rare Items  
- Uncommon Items  
- Common Items

---

⚠️ **Note:** If an item appears in multiple categories, the category with the **highest keep percentage** takes priority.
